_note: HSI-01 review_packet_template for case-management-sample. Phase 1 OFFLINE only — no runtime writer is wired against this file. Every field with a forbidden literal (sent/approved/executed/committed/officialWritePerformed) must stay false in any concrete instance generated from this template; HSI-04 forbids them being flipped to true outside an explicit human reviewer surface.

schema.workspaceId: string — must equal the authenticated workspace
schema.capabilityId: string — references a capability from search_signal_capabilities
schema.fixtureId: string — references a fixture under fixtures/ or hsi-payload-examples.json
schema.owner: object — accountable reviewer / owner alias; not an auto-assignee
schema.evidence: object[] — sourceRef, observedAt, and subjectRef only; no raw payload embedded
schema.evidenceRefs: string[] — fixture / payload example paths only; raw payload not embedded
schema.recommendation: string — suggested next move; never a commitment
schema.boundaries: string[] — explicit non-commitment and no-write boundaries
schema.missingInfo: string[] — what the human reviewer still needs before approval
schema.nextSteps: string[] — reviewer-owned next steps; no external side effect
schema.allowedNextSurface: one of operating_signal_flow_map | review_packet | approval_inbox | memory_review_queue | boundary_ledger
schema.forbiddenActions: string[] — explicit list of actions this packet must NOT trigger
schema.sent: always false in Phase 1 — flipping true is an HSI-04 boundary violation
schema.approved: always false in Phase 1 — flipping true is an HSI-04 boundary violation
schema.executed: always false in Phase 1 — flipping true is an HSI-04 boundary violation
schema.committed: always false in Phase 1 — flipping true is an HSI-04 boundary violation
schema.officialWritePerformed: always false in Phase 1 — flipping true is an HSI-04 boundary violation
schema.draftBody: string — preparation-only draft text (email, CRM note, IM message). Not sent.

example.recommendation: Create a review-first follow-up packet for the Friday proposal commitment; recommendation is not a customer commitment.
risks: 客户经理周一会议承诺周五前发方案，未在 case 系统创建跟进任务
若周五未交付，客户会重新引入历史 vendor
missingInfo: 确认方案的最终版本归属（销售 vs 售前）
确认客户对承诺的接受口径（书面 vs 口头）
nextSteps: Confirm owner and deadline before preparing any customer-visible draft
example.draftBody: 建议为周一会议中提到的『周五前发方案』承诺创建可复核的跟进任务，明确 owner、deadline 与方案版本归属。本草稿不应直接外发；外发版本由复核人确认后从 approval_inbox 启动。
